dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6873 IH: Geothermal Tax Parity Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Maloy (for herself, Mr. Garamendi, Mr. Moore of Utah, Mr. Fulcher, and Mr. Horsford) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to allow amortization of geological and geophysical expenditures in connection with the exploration for, or development of, geothermal deposits, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Geothermal Tax Parity Act.

section.header: Amortization of geological and geophysical expenditures in connection with exploration for or development of geothermal deposits

subsection.text: Section 167(h)(1) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by striking oil or gas and inserting oil, gas, or geothermal deposits.
The amendment made by this section shall apply to amounts paid or incurred in taxable years beginning after the date of the enactment of this Act.

section.header: Exception to passive loss limitations for working interests in geothermal properties

subsection.text: Section 469(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended—

paragraph.text: in the paragraph heading, by striking oil and gas and inserting oil, gas, and geothermal, and
by striking oil or gas each place it appears and inserting oil, gas, or geothermal in each such place.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to taxable years beginning after the date of the enactment of this Act.
